content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "你現在在做什麼？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "喂，你現在在做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Wèi, nǐ xiànzài zài zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wei4, ni3 xian4zai4 zai4 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hey, what are you doing now?",
          "translation_ko": "여보세요, 지금 뭐 하고 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我現在正在看書。你呢？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài kàn shū. Nǐ ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 kan4 shu1. Ni3 ne?",
          "translation_en": "I'm reading a book right now. And you?",
          "translation_ko": "지금 책을 보고 있어요. 당신은요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我現在在滑手機，沒有做什麼特別的事。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiànzài zài huá shǒujī, méiyǒu zuò shénme tèbié de shì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xian4zai4 zai4 hua2 shou3ji1, mei2you3 zuo4 shen2me te4bie2 de shi4.",
          "translation_en": "I'm scrolling on my phone, not doing anything special.",
          "translation_ko": "지금 핸드폰을 보고 있어요, 특별히 하는 일은 없어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "這樣啊。你等一下有空嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zhèyàng a. Nǐ děng yīxià yǒu kòng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4yang4 a. Ni3 deng3 yi1xia4 you3 kong4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I see. Do you have time later?",
          "translation_ko": "그렇군요. 잠시 후에 시간 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "有啊，怎麼了？",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu a, zěnme le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 a, zen3me le?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, what's up?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 왜요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我想跟你一起喝咖啡，方便嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng gēn nǐ yīqǐ hē kāfēi, fāngbiàn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 gen1 ni3 yi1qi3 he1 ka1fei1, fang1bian4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I'd like to have coffee with you. Is that convenient?",
          "translation_ko": "같이 커피 마시고 싶은데, 괜찮으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊，沒問題。我們等一下見。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, méi wèntí. Wǒmen děng yīxià jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a, mei2 wen4ti2. Wo3men deng3 yi1xia4 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, no problem. See you later.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 문제없어요. 잠시 후에 봐요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is person B doing now?",
          "question_ko": "B는 지금 무엇을 하고 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Reading a book", "Scrolling on phone", "Drinking coffee"],
          "options_ko": ["책을 보고 있다", "핸드폰을 보고 있다", "커피를 마시고 있다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '正在' and the question intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Answer the question: '你現在在做什麼？' in a complete sentence."
    },
    {
      "title": "現在不能講電話",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "喂，你現在方便講電話嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wèi, nǐ xiànzài fāngbiàn jiǎng diànhuà ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wei4, ni3 xian4zai4 fang1bian4 jiang3 dian4hua4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hey, is it convenient for you to talk on the phone now?",
          "translation_ko": "여보세요, 지금 통화하기 괜찮으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不好意思，我現在正在開會，不方便講電話。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài kāihuì, bù fāngbiàn jiǎng diànhuà.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si, wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 kai1hui4, bu4 fang1bian4 jiang3 dian4hua4.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, I'm in a meeting right now, so it's not convenient to talk.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 지막 회의 중이라 통화하기 어려워요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒關係，不急。你什麼時候有空？",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, bù jí. Nǐ shénme shíhou yǒu kòng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 guan1xi, bu4 ji2. Ni3 shen2me shi2hou you3 kong4?",
          "translation_en": "No problem, it's not urgent. When will you be free?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 급하지 않아요. 언제 시간 되세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我大概再一個小時就開完會了。等一下再打給你，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ dàgài zài yī ge xiǎoshí jiù kāi wán huì le. Děng yīxià zài dǎ gěi nǐ, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 da4gai4 zai4 yi1 ge xiao3shi2 jiu4 kai1 wan2 hui4 le. Deng3 yi1xia4 zai4 da3 gei3 ni3, hao3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I'll probably finish the meeting in about an hour. I'll call you back later, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "한 시간쯤 후에 회의가 끝날 것 같아요. 나중에 다시 전화드릴게요, 괜찮으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，你慢慢來，不急。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, nǐ mànmàn lái, bù jí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, ni3 man4man4 lai2, bu4 ji2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, take your time, no rush.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 천천히 하세요, 급하지 않아요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why can't person B talk on the phone now?",
          "question_ko": "B는 왜 지금 통화할 수 없습니까?",
          "options_en": ["He is sleeping", "He is in a meeting", "He is eating"],
          "options_ko": ["자는 중이다", "회의 중이다", "식사 중이다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the polite apology '不好意思' and the phrase '正在開會'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Answer the question: '你現在方便講電話嗎？' with a reason why you cannot talk."
    },
    {
      "title": "我正在複習中文",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你現在在做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiànzài zài zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xian4zai4 zai4 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "What are you doing now?",
          "translation_ko": "지금 뭐 하고 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我現在正在複習中文。明天有考試。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài fùxí zhōngwén. Míngtiān yǒu kǎoshì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 fu4xi2 zhong1wen2. Ming2tian1 you3 kao3shi4.",
          "translation_en": "I'm reviewing Chinese right now. I have an exam tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "지금 중국어를 복습하고 있어요. 내일 시험이 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "哇，你好認真。你複習了什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Wā, nǐ hǎo rènzhēn. Nǐ fùxí le shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wa1, ni3 hao3 ren4zhen1. Ni3 fu4xi2 le shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Wow, you're so diligent. What have you reviewed?",
          "translation_ko": "와, 정말 열심히네요. 뭘 복습했어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我複習了生詞和句子，也練習了寫字。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ fùxí le shēngcí hé jùzi, yě liànxí le xiě zì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 fu4xi2 le sheng1ci2 he2 ju4zi, ye3 lian4xi2 le xie3 zi4.",
          "translation_en": "I reviewed vocabulary and sentences, and also practiced writing characters.",
          "translation_ko": "단어와 문장을 복습했고, 글자 쓰기도 연습했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你覺得中文難嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ juéde zhōngwén nán ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 jue2de zhong1wen2 nan2 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Do you think Chinese is difficult?",
          "translation_ko": "중국어가 어렵다고 생각해요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有一點難，可是很有意思。我喜歡學中文。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu yīdiǎn nán, kěshì hěn yǒu yìsi. Wǒ xǐhuān xué zhōngwén.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 yi1dian3 nan2, ke3shi4 hen3 you3 yi4si. Wo3 xi3huan1 xue2 zhong1wen2.",
          "translation_en": "It's a little difficult, but very interesting. I like learning Chinese.",
          "translation_ko": "조금 어렵지만, 아주 재미있어요. 저는 중국어 배우는 것을 좋아해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "加油！你一定可以考得很好。",
          "pinyin": "Jiāyóu! Nǐ yīdìng kěyǐ kǎo dé hěn hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jia1you2! Ni3 yi1ding4 ke3yi3 kao3 de2 hen3 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Keep it up! I'm sure you'll do well on the exam.",
          "translation_ko": "힘내세요! 분명히 시험 잘 볼 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "謝謝你！希望明天考試順利。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè nǐ! Xīwàng míngtiān kǎoshì shùnlì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie4 ni3! Xi1wang4 ming2tian1 kao3shi4 shun4li4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you! I hope the exam goes smoothly tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다! 내일 시험이 잘 되길 바래요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is person B doing now?",
          "question_ko": "B는 지금 무엇을 하고 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Watching TV", "Reviewing Chinese", "Eating dinner"],
          "options_ko": ["TV를 보고 있다", "중국어를 복습하고 있다", "저녁을 먹고 있다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the use of '正在複習' and the encouraging tone in '加油'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Answer the question: '你現在在做什麼？' by saying you are studying Chinese."
    }
  ]
}
